title: ficus squamellosa
intro: Ficus squamellosa, also known as the banyan fig, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Moraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which contain anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ficus squamellosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
